policy.replan_rule: When repo structure changes, run `make writeback-apply WRITE=1` before continuing.

contract.purpose: Main application entry point — starts the HTTP server
contract.invariants: Listens on PORT env var (default 8080); never imports from tests/
contract.verification: python app.py starts without error; curl localhost:8080/health returns 200

contract.purpose: Application configuration — database URL, log level, feature flags
contract.invariants: No secrets; all sensitive values read from environment variables
contract.verification: App starts with default config; no credentials in file

contract.purpose: Unit tests for app.py HTTP handlers
contract.invariants: Tests must not require network access or running server
